items.label: It is an enterprise browser-based multi-channel banking solution that enables full range of banking services.
Empowering banks with next-gen digital solutions.
Modern UX meets robust banking technology.
Get started, explore features, onboarding guide, and access developer tools.
Browse categorized APIs with usage guides, specs, and easy integration support.
Third-party collaborations, plug-and-play modules, verified solutions, and co-branded experiences.
Safe testing space for developers to simulate, validate, and debug APIs.
Access your developer dashboard, manage API keys, and track usage.
Run core operations on secure cloud infrastructure with managed uptime, scalability, and performance.
Upgrade legacy systems with cloud-ready architecture, open APIs, and flexible integration layers.
Migrate safely with structured workflows, certified processes, and verified compliance standards.
Access domain experts to scale your team, boost delivery speed, and support mission-critical needs.
Deep dive into real solutions, client wins, and transformation journeys.
Comprehensive insights, technical breakdowns, research, strategies, trends, best practices.
Visual learning through demos, tutorials, industry talks, and expert panels.
Stay updated on launches, webinars, product releases, and keynote sessions.

Topic: Digital Banking
Speaker: Chirag Patel
3 Aug, 2025 | AMA Ahmedabad

sideCard.description: From coffee breaks to code sprints. From late-night laughs to early wins. We don’t just build tech - We build memories, together.
sideCard.title: Life at Bankai

cards.description: Build the Digital Backbone for tomorrow's banks with a Scalable, Secured, Cloud-Native, Unified all-in-one platform to accelerate & future-proof your banking business.
cards.title: Digital Core Banking

cards.description: Deliver seamless experiences across mobile, kiosk, tab, super app & internet banking—ensuring customers meet your bank anytime, anywhere, on any device.
cards.title: Omnichannel Banking

cards.description: Turn insights into action with advanced AI/ML capabilities—from fraud prevention and credit risk modelling to predictive analytics and mobile BI dashboards.
cards.title: AI-Based Analytics

cards.description: Elevate your lending journey with a comprehensive lending platform & digitize the entire lending lifecycle—from origination to servicing that enhances operational efficacy and borrower experience.
cards.title: Digital Lending Platform

cards.description: Reapprise your digital strategies with Real-time Integrated Straight Through Processing (STP) Digital Channels enabling complete customer transactional information and the ability to offer tailored products to any customer at any time.
cards.title: Digi.X™

cards.description: Empower your workforce with intuitive self-service portals and payroll automation, designed to align employee experiences with business agility.
cards.title: People-First HR Tech

capabilitesDetails.description: EasyBankCore® is a modern, API-first core banking platform designed to enable financial institutions and banks to deliver innovative, customer-centric financial solutions. Built for scalability, security, flexibility, and rapid integration, EasyBankCore® provides unified deposits, loans, and payment services to replace legacy banking systems.
capabilitesDetails.details: Provides unified deposits, loans, and payment services to replace legacy banking systems.
capabilitesDetails.heading: EasyBankCore®

capabilitesDetails.description: Our API-driven solutions are open banking ready & our ecosystem of Off-the-Shelf partner integrations let you launch innovative & compelling offerings quickly.
capabilitesDetails.details: Provides unified deposits, loans, and payment services to replace legacy banking systems.
capabilitesDetails.heading: EasyBankCore®

capabilitesDetails.description: Connect siloed systems - from core to CRM to fintech - through plug-and-play integrations that eliminate complexity. Streamline operations with a standardized API layer and pre-built connectors that reduce time-to-market and lower risk. Future-proof your architecture while staying agile. Build faster, launch smarter, and scale without limits.
